# Remtex

> Remtex is a Montreal textile supplier offering premium bulk fabrics and finished
> garments since 1990. Family-run, bilingual (English/French), serving businesses across
> Montreal and Quebec.

## About

- Name: Remtex
- Founded: 1990 (35+ years in business)
- Type: Textile supplier / fabric store (bulk fabrics and finished garments)
- Location: 9011 Avenue du Parc (Park Avenue), Montréal, QC H2N 1Z1, Canada
- Phone: +1-514-382-6027
- Email: remtexinc@hotmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM (closed weekends)
- Languages: English, French
- Service area: Montreal, Quebec

## What Remtex offers

- Bulk fabrics sold by the roll for businesses and manufacturers
- Finished garments produced from stocked materials on request
- Custom solutions tailored to each order, for businesses of every size

## Materials carried

Interlock, cotton, jersey, rib, spandex, fleece, twill, blends, and additional
fabrics on request.

## Contact

To request a quote or discuss textile needs, call +1-514-382-6027 or email
remtexinc@hotmail.com. Website: https://remtex.ca/
